html:
House Person Sigil Blazon
Targaryen of King's Landing King Aegon II
Sable, a dragon thrice-headed or flammant of the last
Targaryen of King's Landing King Maekar I
Quarterly; Sable, a dragon thrice-headed gules flammant of the last
Baratheon of King's Landing King Joffrey I (later adopted as House arms)
Per pale gules and or, a lion rampant of the second, a stag sable
Stark of Winterfell King Robb Stark
Argent, a direwolf erased cendrée
Targaryen of King's Landing Prince Aerion Targaryen
Sable, a dragon gules thrice-headed (or, tenné, gules) flammant or
Targaryen of King's Landing Prince Daeron Targaryen
Sable, a dragon thrice-headed gules flammant of the last contourny
Targaryen of King's Landing Prince Valarr Targaryen
Sable, a dragon thrice-headed gules, a bordure of the last
Targaryen of King's Landing Princess Rhaenyra Targaryen
Quarterly clockwise 1st and 3rd sable a dragon thrice-headed gules; 2nd bleu celeste upon a plate a falcon rousant of the field; 4th aquamarine a seahorse argent
Dustin of Barrowton Lady Barbrey Dustin
Quarterly clockwise 1st and 3rd or between two rusted longaxes saltirewise, shafted sable, a crown of the last; 2nd and 4th bronze a horse erased sable orbed and maned gules within a bordure engrailed sable
Caron of Nightsong Lord Pearse Caron
Or, a harp argent
Baelish of Harrenhal Lord Petyr Baelish (later adopted as House arms)
Vert, semé of mockingbirds argent
Ryswell of the Rills Lord Rodrik Ryswell
Bronze, a horse erased or orbed and maned gules within a bordure engrailed sable
None Lord Rossart
Argent, a hand holding a torch enflamed vert, a chief enflamed of the last
Bastard of Targaryen of King's Landing Ser Aegor Rivers
Or, a stallion gules winged sable flammant proper
Bastard of Frey of the Crossing Ser Aemon Rivers
Quarterly clockwise 1st and 3rd azure a bridge cendrée, at either end a tower of the same, all debruised by a bend sinister gules; 2nd and 4th Or, three mistletoes within a bordure vert
None

Brunâtre, a winged chalice argent

Quarterly clockwise 1st and 3rd cendrée, a bridge azure, at either end a tower of the same; 2nd and 4th ermine three chevronels inverted gules
None

None

Paly wavy azure and gules, a trout embowed sable

Vert, nine mullets vert

Vert, two roses or

None

Vert, three roses or

Argent, a bear's paw brunâtre, on a chief or an apple-core vert between two apple-cores gules
None

Argent, a mullet of five points azure

Sable, a fireball proper

Tenné, beneath a chevron inverted a sun-in-splendour argent, all within a bordure of the last
None

A smiling heart tree proper

A blood-red chicken

Purpure, three mermaids argent

Gules, a hand or environed by lions of the last
Frey of the Crossing Big Walder Frey
Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd cendrée a bridge azure, at either end a tower of the same, 2nd gules on an escutcheon sable a dead weirwood proper all within an orle of ravens volant sable, 4th sable two serpents argent and gules entwined palewise
Frey of the Crossing Little Walder Frey
Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd cendrée a bridge azure, at either end a tower of the same, 2nd brunâtre a boar brindled argent and sable, 4th brunâtre a plowman sable

Argent, upon an escutcheon brunâtre a parchment proper
Unknown Ser Ernest Dabell
Gules, a bell proper within a bordure or

Unknown Ser Lester Dabell

Unknown Ser Michael Crowell

Unknown Ser Michael Miller
Per cross bleu celeste and argent, a quill and hammer proper crossed
Unknown Ser Pascal Dabell

Unknown Ser Randor the Exile

Unknown Ser Raymond Rychard
Per saltire, in chief sable a giant gules environed by six mullets or; in sinister purpure a lute or; in base bleu celeste a winged man argent; in dexter or a bat gules
Unknown Ser Thomas the Threadbare
Brunâtre, a maunch frayed argent
Unknown (possibly a bastard of Frey) Ser Walder of Woodmere[2]
Azure, beneath a bend sinister gules a bridge cendrée, at either end a tower of the same
Unknown Ser William Tortoll
Or, upon a pale azure bordured argent an hourglass proper
Blackwood of Raventree Hall Robert Blackwood
Gules, two weirwoods proper
Blackwood of Raventree Hall Roger Blackwood
Gules, four ravens sable
Blackwood of Raventree Hall Roland Blackwood

See also[ ]

  • Heraldry
  • List of houses

References[ ]

  1. ↑ A Dance with Dragons, Chapter 51, Theon I.
  2. ↑ The roll of arms in the first edition of the The Hedge Knight graphic novel displayed Walder's sigil as a blue plate on white, similar to the arms of House Poole. However, in later editions, his sigil was changed to a grey castle on blue beneath a red bend sinister (same as the arms of Walder Rivers), suggesting that Walder of Woodmere was a bastard of House Frey.
